---
title: "Experience"
toc: false
---

## Research & Industry Experience

### Sustainability Lab, IIT Gandhinagar  
**Junior Research Fellow** | Aug 2025 – Present  
*(PI: Prof. Nipun Batra)*

- Leading the development of a deep learning–based framework to learn spatio-temporal representations from WRF model outputs  
- Conducting multi-domain WRF simulations, GDAS preprocessing, and systematic spatio-temporal evaluation of model outputs  
- Designing and analyzing emulator architectures through spatial and temporal comparisons with WRF simulations  
- Producing reproducible analytics, visualizations, and documentation to support research outcomes  
- Acting as primary researcher on the project, mentoring junior students and coordinating experiments under PI supervision  

---

### Space Applications Centre (ISRO), Ahmedabad  
**Research Intern** | July 2024 – April 2025

- Developed and evaluated CNN-, YOLO-, and ConvLSTM-based models in PyTorch for satellite imagery analysis  
- Worked on tropical cyclone intensity estimation and temporal forecasting using multi-channel satellite and reanalysis data  
- Built robust preprocessing, normalization, augmentation, and class-balancing pipelines for multi-event, multi-year datasets  
- Achieved model accuracy up to 94% while ensuring robustness across diverse cyclone scenarios  
- Interpreted model outputs in collaboration with domain experts to ensure physical and meteorological consistency  

---

### Jio Platforms Limited (Reliance)  
**Summer Intern** | May 2024 – July 2024

- Conducted literature review and dataset analysis for personality detection in sports-related multimedia data  
- Designed analytical frameworks and automated data collection and labeling workflows  
- Applied prompt engineering techniques to generate diverse, structured datasets for downstream evaluation  
- Gained hands-on experience deploying LLM-driven workflows in an industry research setting  

---

### Enlighten Infosystems, Vadodara  
**Data Science Intern** | Feb 2023 – May 2023

- Designed automated data pipelines for cleaning, integrating, and analyzing large heterogeneous datasets  
- Developed and deployed Flask-based analytical web applications with backend databases  
- Delivered interpretable outputs and reports within short, iterative development cycles  

---

### Spartificial  
**ML Research Intern** | June 2022 – Aug 2022

- Curated and analyzed multilingual datasets across seven languages to support NLP model development  
- Performed comparative evaluation of deep learning and time-series models (DenseNet, ResNet, ARIMA)  
- Documented performance trade-offs and insights using structured visual and analytical summaries
